epics.title: User Authentication and Authorization
epics.summary: Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.
epics.description: Develop a secure user authentication system using OAuth and implement multi-factor authentication (MFA). Ensure role-based access control to manage user permissions based on their profile and authorization level.

epics.title: Database Schema Design
epics.summary: Design the database schema for storing user data and banking transactions.
epics.description: Create a PostgreSQL database schema to manage user profiles, banking products, transaction histories, and other essential entities. Ensure data normalization and implement necessary indexing for optimal performance.

epics.title: Basic UI Shell
epics.summary: Develop the basic UI shell for the self-service portal.
epics.description: Design the initial user interface using React, providing a responsive layout adaptable to desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Create a clean, user-friendly design consistent with the bank's branding guidelines.

epics.title: Personalized Dashboard
epics.summary: Create a personalized dashboard displaying relevant banking products and services.
epics.description: Develop a personalized dashboard using React, dynamically displaying banking products and services based on user profile and eligibility. Ensure the dashboard provides a seamless and intuitive user experience.

epics.title: Account Opening Request Workflow
epics.summary: Implement a workflow for submitting account opening requests.
epics.description: Build a streamlined workflow allowing users to submit account opening requests with minimal clicks. Ensure the process is intuitive and allows users to save and resume incomplete applications. Integrate with the core banking system for request processing.

epics.title: Service Modification Workflow
epics.summary: Implement a workflow for submitting service modifications.
epics.description: Build a workflow allowing users to submit requests for modifying existing banking services. Ensure the process is efficient, user-friendly, and integrated with the core banking system for real-time processing.

epics.title: Integration with Core Banking System
epics.summary: Seamlessly integrate the portal with the bank's core banking system.
epics.description: Develop connectors and APIs to integrate the self-service portal with the core banking system. Ensure data synchronization between the systems, providing real-time updates and maintaining data consistency.

epics.title: Real-time Status Updates
epics.summary: Implement real-time status updates for submitted requests.
epics.description: Develop a system to provide users with real-time status updates for their submitted account opening and service modification requests. Utilize WebSockets or polling mechanisms to ensure timely updates.

epics.title: Email Notification System
epics.summary: Set up an email notification system for user updates.
epics.description: Implement an email notification system using FastAPI and Redis, informing users about the status of their requests, incomplete applications, and other important updates.

epics.title: Comprehensive Interaction History
epics.summary: Maintain a comprehensive history of all user interactions.
epics.description: Build a system to log and display a comprehensive history of user interactions on the portal. Ensure that the data is securely stored and easily accessible to users through their dashboards.

epics.title: Save and Resume Incomplete Applications
epics.summary: Enable users to save incomplete applications and resume later.
epics.description: Develop functionality allowing users to save their progress on incomplete applications and resume them at a later time. Ensure that the saved data is securely stored and easily retrievable.

epics.title: Role-based Access Control
epics.summary: Implement role-based access control for user authorization.
epics.description: Enhance the security framework by implementing role-based access control, ensuring that users can only view and access services appropriate to their profiles and authorization levels.

user_stories.epic_title: Implement secure multi-factor authentication for all users
user_stories.title: Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) via SMS
user_stories.description:
As a user, I want to receive a verification code via SMS after entering my password, so that I can complete the login process securely.

Core Domain Objects:
- token
- OTP
- session

Attributes & Rules:
- Generate and send a unique OTP to the user's registered mobile number.
- Validate the OTP within a limited time window.
- Invalidate the OTP after use or expiration.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: OTP received via SMS
Given a user has entered a valid password
When the user is prompted for MFA
Then an OTP is sent to the user's registered mobile number

Scenario: Successful MFA with OTP
Given a user received a valid OTP
When the user submits the OTP
Then the user is authenticated and logged in

Scenario: Failed MFA due to incorrect OTP
Given a user enters an incorrect OTP
When the user submits the OTP
Then the user receives an error message

Test Cases:

Feature: Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) via SMS

Scenario: OTP received via SMS
Given a user has entered a valid password
When the user is prompted for MFA
Then an OTP is sent to the user's registered mobile number

Scenario: Successful MFA with OTP
Given a user received a valid OTP
When the user submits the OTP
Then the user is authenticated and logged in

Scenario: Failed MFA due to incorrect OTP
Given a user enters an incorrect OTP
When the user submits the OTP
Then the user receives an error message

Priority: High - Adds an additional layer of security with OTP verification.

- Validate the OTP generated by the authenticator app within a limited time window.
- Invalidate the OTP after use or expiration.

Acceptance Criteria:

Given a user has linked their account to an authenticator app
When the user is prompted for MFA

When the user submits the OTP

Given a user enters an incorrect OTP
When the user submits the OTP
Then the user receives an error message

user_stories.title: Session management
user_stories.description:
As an admin, I want to manage user sessions effectively, so that I can monitor and control login activities.

Core Domain Objects:
- session
- token

Attributes & Rules:
- Track and log user session activities.
- Implement session expiration and renewal mechanisms.
- Provide admin tools for session termination.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Session tracking
Given a user is logged in
When the user performs actions on their account
Then the activities are logged in the session management system

Scenario: Session expiration after inactivity
Given a user session is inactive for a specified time
When the time limit is reached
Then the session expires automatically

Scenario: Admin terminates a user session
Given an admin needs to revoke a user's access
When the admin terminates the session
Then the user is logged out immediately

Test Cases:

Feature: Session management

Scenario: Session tracking
Given a user is logged in
When the user performs actions on their account
Then the activities are logged in the session management system

Scenario: Session expiration after inactivity
Given a user session is inactive for a specified time
When the time limit is reached
Then the session expires automatically

Scenario: Admin terminates a user session
Given an admin needs to revoke a user's access
When the admin terminates the session
Then the user is logged out immediately

Priority: Medium - Ensures active sessions are tracked and can be managed.

user_stories.epic_title: Create data models for storing user information securely.
user_stories.title: Design secure data models
user_stories.description:
As a user, I want to have my data stored securely in well-structured data models, so that my personal information is protected.

Core Domain Objects:
- user profile
- account details
- preferences

Attributes & Rules:
- Define clear data models for user profiles, account details, and preferences.
- Ensure that all data models follow relevant data protection regulations.
- Implement encryption standards in the data models to ensure security.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Data model creation
Given a new user profile
When the user profile is created
Then the data model must store user details in a secure format
And the data must be encrypted

Scenario: Data model update
Given an existing user profile
When the user updates their account details
Then the updates must follow the data protection regulations
And the data must remain encrypted

Scenario: Invalid data model
Given an invalid input
When the system processes the data
Then an error message is returned
And the data is not stored

Test Cases:

Feature: Secure data models

Scenario: Data model creation
Given a new user profile
When the user profile is created
Then the data model must store user details in a secure format
And the data must be encrypted

Scenario: Data model update
Given an existing user profile
When the user updates their account details
Then the updates must follow the data protection regulations
And the data must remain encrypted

Scenario: Invalid data model
Given an invalid input
When the system processes the data
Then an error message is returned
And the data is not stored
user_stories.priority_business_value: High - Ensures user data protection and compliance with regulations.

user_stories.title: Implement data encryption
user_stories.description:
As an admin, I want to ensure that all sensitive user data is encrypted, so that data privacy and security are maintained.

Core Domain Objects:
- user profile
- account details
- preferences

Attributes & Rules:
- Utilize industry-standard encryption protocols for securing user data.
- Ensure encryption during both data at rest and data in transit.
- Regularly update encryption protocols to maintain data security.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Encrypt data at rest
Given user profile information
When the data is stored
Then it must be encrypted using the defined standards

Scenario: Encrypt data in transit
Given user profile information
When the data is transmitted
Then it must be encrypted to ensure security

Scenario: Encryption failure
Given data storage process
When encryption protocol fails
Then the data must not be stored
And an alert must be raised

Test Cases:

Scenario: Encrypt data at rest
Given user profile information
When the data is stored
Then it must be encrypted using the defined standards

Scenario: Encrypt data in transit
Given user profile information
When the data is transmitted
Then it must be encrypted to ensure security

Scenario: Encryption failure
Given data storage process
When encryption protocol fails
Then the data must not be stored
And an alert must be raised
user_stories.priority_business_value: High - Maintains data privacy and security, complying with data protection regulations.

- navigation item
- section
- user profile

Attributes & Rules:

- Highlight the currently active section for improved user experience.
- Ensure accessibility and keyboard navigation support.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Display navigation items
Given the user is on any page
When the Side Navigation Bar is loaded
Then it must display all major sections of the application

Scenario: Highlight active section
Given the user is on a specific page
When the Side Navigation Bar is loaded
Then it must highlight the currently active section

Scenario: Accessibility
Given the user has accessibility needs
When navigating the Side Navigation Bar

And provide accessible labels

user_stories.epic_title: Implement role-based access control for user actions.
user_stories.title: Assign roles to users
user_stories.description:
As an admin, I want to assign roles to users, so that I can control their access levels and permissions.

Core Domain Objects:
- Role
- User Profile

Attributes & Rules:
- Users must have one or more roles assigned to them.
- The assignment of roles must be logged for auditing.
- Only active roles can be assigned to users.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Successfully assign a role to a user
Given I am logged in as an admin
And there is a role available
When I assign the role to a user
Then the user's profile should reflect the new role
And the assignment should be logged

Scenario: Fail to assign an inactive role to a user
Given I am logged in as an admin
And the role is inactive
When I attempt to assign the role to a user
Then the system should display an error indicating that the role is inactive
And the assignment should not proceed

Scenario: View audit log for role assignments
Given I am logged in as an admin
When I assign a role to a user
Then I should be able to view the audit log entry for the assignment

Test Cases:

Feature: Role Management

Scenario: Successfully assign a role to a user
Given I am logged in as an admin
And there is a role available
When I assign the role to a user
Then the user's profile should reflect the new role
And the assignment should be logged

Scenario: Fail to assign an inactive role to a user
Given I am logged in as an admin
And the role is inactive
When I attempt to assign the role to a user
Then the system should display an error indicating that the role is inactive
And the assignment should not proceed

Scenario: View audit log for role assignments
Given I am logged in as an admin
When I assign a role to a user
Then I should be able to view the audit log entry for the assignment

Priority: High - Critical for managing user permissions and access controls.

user_stories.epic_title: Implement role-based access control for user actions.
user_stories.title: Update role permissions
user_stories.description:
As an admin, I want to update role permissions, so that I can modify the access levels of users in response to changing requirements.

Core Domain Objects:
- Role
- Permissions

Attributes & Rules:
- Permissions for a role can be updated at any time.
- Updates to role permissions must be logged for auditing.
- Only active roles can have permissions updated.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario: Successfully update role permissions
Given I am logged in as an admin
And there is an existing active role
When I update the permissions for the role
Then the role permissions should be updated
And the update should be logged

Scenario: Fail to update permissions for an inactive role
Given I am logged in as an admin
And the role is inactive

architecture_generation.description: Azure self-service banking portal where Bank Customer traffic enters via Azure Front Door (WAF/CDN) and reaches a Portal Web App (App Service/Static Web Apps) that authenticates users with Microsoft Entra ID (or Entra ID B2C) and calls Azure API Management for JWT validation, throttling, and routing to backend services (AKS/App Service APIs and Azure Functions/Logic Apps) which persist portal-owned transactional data in Azure SQL Database and store uploaded documents in Azure Blob Storage, with API Management also brokering integrations to the external Core Banking System and backend services using Entra-issued tokens and managed identities for downstream access.
